📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月06日 周一
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [elder-plinius/T3MP3ST](https://github.com/elder-plinius/T3MP3ST)
   autonomous red teaming platform; multi-agent offensive-security meta-harness | ⭐1617
2. [jamesob/local-llm](https://github.com/jamesob/local-llm)
   Everything I know about running LLMs locally | ⭐916
3. [jmerelnyc/Talos](https://github.com/jmerelnyc/Talos)
   GPU worker client for the Talos network. Pairs with your Talos account, serves o | ⭐676
4. [uzairansaruzi/hermex](https://github.com/uzairansaruzi/hermex)
   Native iPhone app for your Hermes agent | ⭐615
5. [Kulaxyz/token-diet](https://github.com/Kulaxyz/token-diet)
   Always-on token-efficiency skill for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor,  | ⭐584
6. [SuperJJ007/CSSwitch](https://github.com/SuperJJ007/CSSwitch)
   帮你的 Claude Science 一键接入你自己的 API：DeepSeek / 通义千问 / 智谱 GLM / Kimi / MiniMax / 小米 M | ⭐253
7. [Pluviobyte/rnskill](https://github.com/Pluviobyte/rnskill)
   雪踏乌云的 AI Agent Skills 集合 | ⭐195
8. [Oft3r/agentic-trading-desk](https://github.com/Oft3r/agentic-trading-desk)
   AI-assisted trading desk for short-term technical analysis on stocks & ETFs via  | ⭐165

- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
